use_codes.desc: DOSING REGIMEN FOR THE TREATMENT OF SCHIZOPHRENIA IN ADULTS BY ADMINISTERING AN INITIAL DOSE OF PALIPERIDONE PALMITATE FOLLOWED BY MONTHLY DOSE(S)
